name: Farmway
description_short: Farmway Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving Kansas communities with loans, savings accounts, and mobile banking services.
description_long:
Farmway Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union with physical branches in Beloit and Lincoln, Kansas. The organization is structured as a member-owned, not-for-profit institution regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration), distinguishing it from for-profit banks. Founded to serve the financial needs of agricultural and rural communities, Farmway maintains a local presence while offering modern digital banking capabilities.

Farmway offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (4.15% APR), recreational vehicle loans (4.15% APR), fixed-rate mortgages (6.83% APR), and various savings accounts with dividend rates. Members can access accounts through a free mobile banking app featuring remote deposit capture, fund transfers, check imaging, and debit card controls. The credit union also provides skip-a-payment options on loans to provide temporary cash flow relief, and online loan applications with quick approval processes.

The institution differentiates itself through hyperlocal service with two branch locations offering extended drive-thru hours (8:30 am to 4:30 pm weekdays), personalized member service via phone (785-738-2224), and a stated mission focused on cultivating financial well-being. Farmway emphasizes relationship banking with messaging that "every loan has a story, and we want to be a part of yours," suggesting a community-oriented approach distinct from larger national lenders.

Farmway Credit Union is best suited for individuals in its geographic service area (Kansas) seeking traditional banking services with local branch access and competitive loan rates. However, members outside the two identified branch locations would rely entirely on digital banking and phone support. The institution's website provides limited transparency on membership eligibility requirements, account opening processes, or detailed fee structures, which may frustrate prospective members seeking comprehensive product information.
services: Share savings accounts with dividend rates
Free mobile banking app with remote deposit capture
Fund transfers between accounts and loans
pros: Competitive auto and recreational loan rates at 4.15% APR with quick online approval process
Free mobile banking app available to all members with remote deposit capture functionality
Skip-a-payment loan option providing temporary cash flow flexibility without penalty
Extended drive-thru hours (8:30 am to 4:30 pm) for convenient weekday access
Fixed-rate mortgages with emphasis on lower down payments and rate flexibility
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure returns earnings to members as dividend rates
Toll-free customer support (800-530-5154) in addition to local phone line
cons: Limited geographic service area with only two branch locations (Beloit and Lincoln, Kansas) restricts membership accessibility
Website lacks transparency on membership eligibility requirements, making it unclear who can join
No detailed fee schedule or account comparison tool visible on website for informed decision-making
Real estate loan APR (6.83%) significantly higher than auto loan rate (4.15%), suggesting limited competitiveness in mortgage market
Website provides no information on minimum account balances, account types, or savings account APY rates
best_for: Kansas residents in Beloit and Lincoln areas seeking local branch banking with personalized service
Agricultural and rural community members in the credit union's service territory needing auto or farm equipment financing
Mobile-first banking customers who prioritize remote deposit capture and app-based account management
Borrowers seeking flexible loan options including skip-a-payment provisions for temporary financial relief
diagnosis: Farmway Credit Union is best for members in its Kansas service area (Beloit and Lincoln) who value local relationship banking combined with digital convenience and competitive loan rates. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—individuals outside these two locations cannot easily access branch services, and the website provides insufficient information about membership eligibility or product details to evaluate fit before contacting the credit union.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Farmway — Credit Union in BELOIT, KS | CreditDoc
meta_description: Farmway — NCUA-insured credit union in BELOIT, KS. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
